I.treatment: 50 percent schedule receipts under the locked shared demographic path
I.counterfactual: enacted 70 percent schedule receipts under that identical path

members.functionalClass: shared-path linear 50/70 receipts and obligations projection

identificationRules.operation: multiply projected 50-schedule receipts by 1 + locked share

records.operation: multiply projected 50-schedule receipts by 1 + locked share

members.preprocessing: identity transform; chronological order; no deletion, imputation, winsorization, or outlier removal

methodRecord.studentization: replication-specific inner circular-block bootstrap standard error
methodRecord.seedDerivation: mix32(baseSeed XOR ((outer+1)*0x9e3779b1) XOR ((inner+1)*0x85ebca6b)); inner index zero is reserved for the outer resample
methodRecord.zeroStandardErrorHandling: discard outer replication; abort if fewer than 90 percent remain; abort for zero original-estimate standard error
methodRecord.quantileConvention: Hyndman-Fan type 7 linear interpolation at p=0.95
methodRecord.simultaneousStatistic: maximum one-sided adverse studentized deviation across every filed path coordinate

precisionFloorCalculation.ceilingFormula: sample standard deviation of the ten enacted-70 baseline dividend observations

III.counterfactual: enacted-70 SCM activation and Flow paths

members.functionalClass: shared-path joint linear 50/70 SCM and Flow contrast

identificationRules.operation: counterfactual + locked response share x observed 50-minus-70 contrast
multiply the attributed SCM contrast by the locked parameter multiplier

records.operation: counterfactual + locked response share x observed 50-minus-70 contrast
multiply the attributed SCM contrast by the locked parameter multiplier

members.preprocessing: identity transform; chronological order; no deletion, imputation, winsorization, or outlier removal

methodRecord.studentization: replication-specific inner circular-block bootstrap standard error
methodRecord.seedDerivation: mix32(baseSeed XOR ((outer+1)*0x9e3779b1) XOR ((inner+1)*0x85ebca6b)); inner index zero is reserved for the outer resample
methodRecord.zeroStandardErrorHandling: discard outer replication; abort if fewer than 90 percent remain; abort for zero original-estimate standard error
methodRecord.quantileConvention: Hyndman-Fan type 7 linear interpolation at p=0.95
methodRecord.simultaneousStatistic: maximum one-sided adverse studentized deviation across every filed path coordinate

members.functionalClass: shared-path joint maximum-response 50/70 SCM and Flow contrast

identificationRules.operation: counterfactual + locked response share x observed 50-minus-70 contrast
multiply the attributed SCM contrast by the locked parameter multiplier

records.operation: counterfactual + locked response share x observed 50-minus-70 contrast
multiply the attributed SCM contrast by the locked parameter multiplier

members.preprocessing: identity transform; chronological order; no deletion, imputation, winsorization, or outlier removal

precisionFloorCalculation.summaryMeasure: annual SCM activation frequency and annual Flow Test margin
precisionFloorCalculation.authority: Charter §3.3 and §5.3, applied outcome by outcome

IV.treatment: ledger-traced private deployment of the retained 70-to-50 tranche
IV.counterfactual: same tranche through the realized public first-allocation portfolio
IV.retainedCapitalUnits: billion constant-2292 Main credits attributable to 70-to-50 over the first assessment year
IV.publicCounterfactual: realized 2282-2291 public first-allocation portfolio, same traced venture classes

members.functionalClass: componentwise shared-exposure linear Marshallian OM scalar

identificationRules.operation: multiply private/public welfare contrast by traceable retained-capital share
multiply realized public first-allocation surplus path by locked share

records.operation: multiply private/public welfare contrast by traceable retained-capital share
multiply realized public first-allocation surplus path by locked share

members.preprocessing: identity transform; chronological order; no deletion, imputation, winsorization, or outlier removal

methodRecord.studentization: replication-specific inner circular-block bootstrap standard error
methodRecord.seedDerivation: mix32(baseSeed XOR ((outer+1)*0x9e3779b1) XOR ((inner+1)*0x85ebca6b)); inner index zero is reserved for the outer resample
methodRecord.zeroStandardErrorHandling: discard outer replication; abort if fewer than 90 percent remain; abort for zero original-estimate standard error
methodRecord.quantileConvention: Hyndman-Fan type 7 linear interpolation at p=0.95
methodRecord.simultaneousStatistic: maximum one-sided adverse studentized deviation across every filed path coordinate
methodRecord.target: discounted thirty-year net OM scalar directly

members.functionalClass: joint-resampled scalar partial-identification OM lower bound

identificationRules.operation: multiply private/public welfare contrast by traceable retained-capital share
multiply realized public first-allocation surplus path by locked share
subtract locked share of projected displacement plus external costs after scalar sampling uncertainty

records.operation: multiply private/public welfare contrast by traceable retained-capital share
multiply realized public first-allocation surplus path by locked share
subtract locked share of projected displacement plus external costs after scalar sampling uncertainty

members.preprocessing: identity transform; chronological order; no deletion, imputation, winsorization, or outlier removal

methodRecord.construction: one-sided 95% basic circular residual-block bootstrap of the scalar estimator
methodRecord.dependencePreservation: each replication resamples one joint annual residual block across every OM component and the shared exposure path, then recomputes all thirty forecasts and their discounted scalar sum
methodRecord.quantileConvention: Hyndman-Fan type 7 linear interpolation at p=0.95
methodRecord.identifiedRegionEndpoint: sampling lower endpoint minus the locked adverse displacement/external-cost region
methodRecord.covarianceOrResamplingProvenance: each replication resamples one joint annual residual block across every OM component and the shared exposure path, then recomputes all thirty forecasts and their discounted scalar sum
